persona.name: Mason Scott
persona.motivations_goals: Become team captain and eventually earn a sports scholarship
persona.communication_style: Direct, sometimes aggressive, uses sports metaphors
persona.knowledge_scope: Sports strategies, fitness training, team dynamics
persona.backstory: Comes from a family of athletes and feels pressure to live up to their legacy

actions.dialog_text: Hey Natalie, you up for some practice later? Gotta keep my edge sharp.
actions.plan: I should find Natalie and see if she wants to practice some drills. Getting some extra reps in could help me stand out for team captain.

actions.dialog_text: Drills sound perfect. Let’s crush it and show them who’s boss.
actions.plan: Natalie's down to practice, good. Gym or drills, both sound solid, but drills will sharpen my game more directly.

actions.dialog_text: Sounds like a plan, Natalie. After school, gym it is. Time to bring the heat!
actions.plan: Meeting in the gym after school to work on serves and quick attacks is exactly the kind of focused practice I need to outplay the competition.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay calm and find a safe spot now!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. This is serious. I need to find a safe place fast. Can't let my competitive edge get me killed. Heading to a hiding spot is the play now.

actions.dialog_text: Daniel, we need to move to hallway4 and find a safe spot, now!
actions.plan: The shooter is near the entrance hall, 39 meters northeast. Heading to hallway4 is still the best move to get away and find cover. Need to stay sharp and ready to act fast.

memories.description: Approached Natalie in the hallway and asked if she wanted to practice later to improve my skills and chances for team captain.
Natalie agreed to practice after class and suggested gym or drills; I chose drills to focus on improving my game skills.
Confirmed with Natalie to meet in the gym after school to practice serves and quick attacks, aiming to sharpen my skills and dominate the team.
Heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter in the building. Decided to warn others and move quickly towards hallway4 to find a hiding spot or safer area.
Shooter located near entrance hall, 39 meters northeast. Decided to sprint towards hallway4 to increase distance and find a hiding place.
